title: ADDICTIONS/DEPENDENCIES SUPPORT GROUPS - 211info
text: THE CHURCH ADDICTIONS/DEPENDENCIES SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Hosts the peer support group Women for Sobriety. 238 3rd Avenue Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Women age 18 and older Hours: Friday noon Email (541) 791-3411 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 791-3411 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Linn County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Support Groups Drug Use Disorder Support Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE CHURCH
